app.publicBanner: Public read-only view — reporting and moderation are disabled. See the <link>city's 311</link> to file an official request.
app.tagline: See it, flag it, route around it.
app.title: Davis Bike Hazard Map
coverage.count: {count, plural, =0 {No reports yet} one {# report} other {# reports}}
coverage.heading: Reports by area
coverage.hint: How many hazards have been reported in each part of Davis. Few or no reports in an area means it's under-reported — not that it's safe. Help close the gap by reporting what you see.
error.body: This view hit an unexpected error. Anything you saved on this device is safe. You can try again, or switch to another tab.
error.heading: Something went wrong
filters.count: {count, plural, one {# hazard shown} other {# hazards shown}}
footer.attribution: Map data © <link>OpenStreetMap</link> contributors. Community-reported hazards are not verified by the city.
hazard.card.note: Community-reported — not verified by the city.
hazard.card.resolvedNote: Reported fixed{when} — shown briefly so you know it was addressed.
list.empty: No hazards match these filters. That means none have been reported here — not that the area is safe.
locationPicker.aria: Tap the map to set the hazard location
map.aria: Map of reported cycling hazards in Davis
map.caption: Markers show reported hazards. Empty areas mean no reports, not guaranteed safety. Prefer the list view if the map is hard to use.
map.marker.title: {category}, {severity} severity
map.popup.meta: Reported {when} · {count, plural, one {# confirmation} other {# confirmations}}
moderation.empty: Nothing waiting. The queue is clear. ✓
moderation.error.decision: Could not record that decision. Try again.
moderation.error.loadQueue: Could not load the queue. Try again.
moderation.error.osm: Could not draft an OSM Note. Try again.
moderation.error.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
moderation.osm.drafted: Drafted an OSM Note (dry-run — not posted).
moderation.signIn.heading: Moderator sign-in
moderation.signIn.hint: Reports stay hidden from the public map until a moderator approves them. Sign in with your moderator account to review the queue.
myReports.empty: You haven't filed any hazards yet. Reports you make are saved here even when you're offline.
photoEditor.canvasAria: Photo preview. Drag across faces or licence plates to blur them.
photoEditor.error.tooDetailed: This photo is too detailed to compress under the limit. Try a simpler shot.
photoEditor.error.tooLarge: That image is too large. Please choose one under 25 MB.
photoEditor.error.unreadable: Could not read that image. Please try another photo.
photoEditor.hint: Photos are stripped of location data and you can blur faces or plates before anything is saved. This happens on your device.
photoEditor.metadataRemoved: {exif, select, true {Location metadata removed (EXIF GPS found and stripped).} other {Location metadata removed.}}
photoEditor.noFaces: No faces detected automatically — drag to blur any manually.
report.error.saveFailed: Could not save the report on this device.
report.geo.denied: Location permission denied. Set the spot on the map instead.
report.geo.outside: That location is outside Davis. Adjust it on the map.
report.geo.unavailable: Could not get your location. Set the spot on the map instead.
report.offlineHint: You're offline — your report will be saved and synced later.
report.placeholder.description: e.g. Deep pothole in the bike lane just past the light.
report.privacyNote: Your photo's location data is removed on this device before saving, and nothing appears publicly until a moderator approves it.
report.saved.heading: {online, select, true {Report saved and syncing ✓} other {Report saved offline ✓}}
report.saved.offline: You're offline — it's saved on your phone and will sync automatically when you reconnect.
report.saved.online: Thanks! It will appear on the map once a moderator approves it.
route.candidates: {count, plural, one {Chosen from # candidate route to avoid reported hazards.} other {Chosen from # candidate routes to avoid reported hazards.}}
route.fallbackNote: Showing a direct line — live turn-by-turn routing is unavailable (offline or the routing service is down). The hazard list below still reflects what's been reported near this line.
route.hazards.heading: Hazards still on this route
route.hazards.warning: No hazard-free route was found — ride these stretches with extra care.
route.result.heading: Your route
route.steps.heading: Turn-by-turn directions
route.steps.unavailable: Turn-by-turn directions are unavailable for this route.
routeMap.aria: Map of the planned cycling route
status.failed: {count, plural, one {# report couldn't sync — check My Reports.} other {# reports couldn't sync — check My Reports.}}
status.offline: Offline — reports are saved on your device.
status.pending: {count, plural, one {# report waiting to sync.} other {# reports waiting to sync.}}
